---
title: "gglite in Quarto"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
library(gglite)
```

## Scatter plot

```{r}
#| label: scatter
g2(mtcars, hp ~ mpg)
```

## Histogram

```{r}
#| label: histogram
g2(mtcars, ~ mpg)
```

## Line chart (time series)

```{r}
#| label: line
g2(sunspot.year)
```
